item.title: Azure / azure-sdk-for-python
item.description:
Desc: This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for Python. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://docs.microsoft.com/python/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-python.
Lang: Python
Star: 2877
